messages.content:
translate to english （二）审计截止日后至今主要财务信息及经营状况，是否存在重大不利变化
发行人财务报告审计截止日为2022年12月31日。财务报告审计截止日至本回复报告出具日，发行人主要财务信息未发生重大不利变化，2023年第一季度，发行人营业收入同比稳步增长，毛利率同比保持稳定，EBITDA同比稳步增长，归属于母公司股东的净利润和扣除非经常性损益后归属于母公司股东的净利润主要受利息费用同比增长的影响有所下降；发行人经营状况良好，2023年第一季度主要业务的收入均实现了稳定的增长。

Has there been any significant adverse change in the main financial information and business situation since the audit deadline?

The audit deadline for the issuer's financial report is December 31, 2022. From the audit deadline to the issuance date of this reply report, there have been no significant adverse changes in the issuer's main financial information. In the first quarter of 2023, the issuer's operating income steadily increased year-on-year, gross profit margin remained steady year-on-year, EBITDA steadily increased year-on-year, and the net profit attributable to the parent company's shareholders and the net profit attributable to the parent company's shareholders after deducting non-recurring gains and losses were mainly affected by an increase in interest expenses and decreased slightly. The issuer's business situation is good, and the revenue of its main business achieved stable growth in the first quarter of 2023.
translate 2023年第一季度，先正达集团的主要财务信息如下
In the first quarter of 2023, the main financial information of Sinopec Group is as follows:

Item	As of March 31, 2023	As of December 31, 2022	Change
Total assets	59,842,468	57,310,198	4.42%
Total liabilities	32,689,673	30,370,995	7.63%
Total shareholders' equity	27,152,795	26,939,203	0.79%
translate 注：截至2023年3月31日的财务数据来源于管理层报表，未经审阅和审计，截至2022年12月31日的财务数据经审计。
Note: The financial data as of March 31, 2023, is based on the management's report and has not been reviewed or audited. The financial data as of December 31, 2022, has been audited.
translate 单位：万元
Unit: ten thousand yuan.
translate 截至2023年3月31日，发行人资产总计为59,842,468万元，较2022年末增长4.42%，变动幅度较小；负债总计32,689,673万元，较2022年末增长7.63%，主要系季节性营运资金需求扩张及预备偿还10亿美元永续债导致短期借款融资增加所致；股东权益为27,152,795万元，较2022年末增长0.79%。

As of March 31, 2023, the issuer's total assets were RMB 59,842,468 thousand yuan, a slight increase of 4.42% compared to the end of 2022; total liabilities were RMB 32,689,673 thousand yuan, an increase of 7.63% compared to the end of 2022, mainly due to the expansion of seasonal operating capital demand and the increase of short-term borrowing financing caused by the preparation of repaying USD 1 billion perpetual bond; shareholders' equity was RMB 27,152,795 thousand yuan, an increase of 0.79% compared to the end of 2022.

translate 营业利润
利润总额
净利润
归属于母公司股东的净利润
扣除非经常性损益后归属于母公司股东的净利润

Operating profit
Total profit
Net profit
Net profit attributable to the parent company's shareholders
Net profit attributable to the parent company's shareholders after deducting non-recurring gains and losses.
translate 注：2023年1-3月的财务数据来源于管理层报表，未经审阅和审计，2022年1-3月的财务数据经审阅。
Note: The financial data for January-March 2023 is based on the management's report and has not been reviewed or audited. The financial data for January-March 2022 has been reviewed.

translate 2023年第一季度，先正达集团实现营业收入6,312,904万元，同比增长11.39%，主要系受益于市场对先正达集团创新产品和服务的需求，产销量增长，同时公司产品价格维持高位并略有增长所致。2023年第一季度，先正达集团综合毛利率为32.69%，相比同期基本持平，先正达集团继续维持较高的产品价格以抵消成本的上升。受益于营业收入的增长，2023年第一季度，先正达集团实现EBITDA 1,252,548万元，同比增长7.98%。
2023年第一季度，先正达集团实现归属于母公司股东的净利润394,487万元，同比下降了140,152万元，下降26.26%，主要系财务费用尤其是利息费用增长导致。2023年第一季度，先正达集团的财务费用为211,250万元，同比增长184,802万元，主要系贷款及应付款项的利息支出由102,543万元增长至229,953万元，同比增加127,410万元所致。相比去年同期，先正达集团为偿还永续债及补充日常经营所需资金新增了一定规模的借款，导致2023年第一季度利息支出有所增长；同时，自2022年3月以来美元持续加息，浮动利率LIBOR、SOFR均大幅上涨，借款利率升高，综合导致利息支出增长。

In the first quarter of 2023, Sinopec group achieved an operating income of RMB 63,129.04 million, an increase of 11.39% year-on-year, mainly due to the market demand for Sinopec's innovative products and services, as well as the increase in production and sales volume, while the company's product prices remained high and slightly increased. In the first quarter of 2023, Sinopec group achieved a comprehensive gross profit margin of 32.69%, which remained basically flat compared to the same period last year. Sinopec group continued to maintain high product prices to offset the rise in costs. Benefiting from the growth in operating income, in the first quarter of 2023, Sinopec group achieved EBITDA of RMB 12,525.48 million, an increase of 7.98% year-on-year.

In the first quarter of 2023, the net profit attributable to the parent company's shareholders of Sinopec group was RMB 3,944.87 million, a decrease of RMB 1401.52 million or 26.26% compared to the same period last year, mainly due to the increase in financial expenses, particularly interest expenses. In the first quarter of 2023, Sinopec group's financial expenses were RMB 2,112.50 million, an increase of RMB 1,848.02 million year-on-year, mainly due to the increase in interest expenses from loan and accounts payable from RMB 1,025.43 million to RMB 2,299.53 million, an increase of RMB 1,274.10 million year-on-year. Compared with the same period last year, Sinopec group added a certain amount of borrowing to repay perpetual bonds and supplement daily operating funds, which led to an increase in interest expenses in the first quarter of 2023; meanwhile, since March 2022, the US dollar has continued to raise interest rates, and floating rates such as LIBOR and SOFR have increased significantly, resulting in higher borrowing rates and overall leading to an increase in interest expenses.

translate 经营活动使用的现金流量净额
投资活动使用的现金流量净额
筹资活动产生的现金流量净额
现金及现金等价物净增加额

Net cash flows from operating activities
Net cash flows from investing activities
Net cash flows from financing activities
Net increase in cash and cash equivalents.

translate 注1：2023年1-3月的财务数据来源于管理层报表，未经审阅和审计，2022年1-3月的财务数据经审阅；
注2：上年同期负现金流量净额科目变动比例=（1-当期水平/上年同期水平）*100%。

Note 1: The financial data for January-March 2023 is based on the management's report and is not reviewed nor audited. The financial data for January-March 2022 is reviewed.
Note 2: The comparative change percentage in the net cash outflows from the previous year is calculated as (1 - current level / previous year level) * 100%.

translate 2023年第一季度，先正达集团经营活动使用的现金流量净额为-1,981,144万元，净流出同比增加78.66%，主要系随着营业规模扩张及部分供应商在2022年底延长了公司的信用期限，货款延后至2023年第一季度支付，导致购买商品、接受劳务支付的现金增加；筹资活动产生的现金流量净额为3,342,478万元，同比上涨91.73%，主要系2023年第一季度取得借款收到的现金增加导致。

In the first quarter of 2023, the net cash outflows from operating activities of Sinopec Group were -RMB 19,811.44 million, a year-on-year increase of 78.66%, mainly due to the expansion of the business scale and some suppliers extending the company's credit period at the end of 2022, resulting in an increase in cash payments for purchasing goods and receiving services that were postponed to the first quarter of 2023; the net cash flows generated from financing activities were RMB 33,424.78 million, an increase of 91.73% year-on-year, mainly due to the increase in cash received from borrowing in the first quarter of 2023.

translate 2023年第一季度，先正达集团业务经营状况良好，公司的各项业务均实现了稳定的增长。
2023年第一季度，先正达集团的植保业务营业收入增长6%，并且公司的植保业务在中国实现了11%的增长。为应对全球通胀，公司对植保产品价格进行了调整，相应抵消了成本上涨的压力。此外，公司于2023年第一季度在巴西、印度等国家推出了PLINAZOLIN®、Cosayr®、Lapidos®等植保新产品，进一步继续驱动公司业务的增长。
2023年第一季度，先正达集团的种子业务继续保持较好的增长态势，在全球所有区域均通过产品价格调整缓解了成本上升的压力，并实现了超过20%的营业收入增长，中国种子业务增长达到40%。此外，2023年第一季度，公司于美国市场推出了商业化杂交小麦AgriPro®，通过创新进一步提高了公司种子产品的竞争力。

In the first quarter of 2023, Sinopec Group achieved stable growth in all its businesses and maintained good business operating conditions.

In the first quarter of 2023, the revenue from Sinopec's plant protection business increased by 6%, and the plant protection business achieved growth of 11% in China. In response to global inflation, the company adjusted the prices of plant protection products to offset cost pressures. In addition, in the first quarter of 2023, the company launched new plant protection products such as PLINAZOLIN®, Cosayr®, and Lapidos® in countries such as Brazil and India, driving the growth of the company's business.

Sinopec's seed business continued to maintain a good growth trend in the first quarter of 2023, and alleviated cost pressures by adjusting product prices in all regions worldwide. The company achieved a revenue growth of over 20%, with the seed business in China growing by as much as 40%. In addition, in the first quarter of 2023, the company launched the AgriPro ® commercial hybrid wheat in the US market, further improving the competitiveness of the company's seed products through innovation.

translate 2023年第一季度，先正达集团的作物营养业务表现稳定，营业收入与去年同期基本持平，公司作物营养业务持续推进生物肥料+土壤健康战略转型以及差异化产品战略。
2023年第一季度，先正达集团的现代农业服务业务增长迅速，营业收入较去年同期增长68%，截至2023年第一季度末，公司已建成MAP中心638个，数字应用程序注册用户超过240万，持续通过数字工具助力全国各地农场的现代化建设。
综上所述，财务报告审计截止日至本回复报告出具之日，发行人主要财务信息及经营状况均未发生重大不利变化。

In the first quarter of 2023, Sinopec Group's crop nutrition business showed stable performance, with revenue remaining basically flat compared to the same period last year. The company continued to promote the strategy transformation of biological fertilizers + soil health and differentiated product strategy for its crop nutrition business.

In the first quarter of 2023, Sinopec group's modern agricultural service business grew rapidly, with revenue increasing by 68% compared to the same period last year. As of the end of the first quarter of 2023, the company had built 638 MAP centers, and the number of registered users of its digital applications exceeded 2.4 million, continuously helping modernize the construction of farms across the country through digital tools.

In summary, from the audit deadline to the issuance date of this reply report, there have been no significant adverse changes in the issuer's main financial information and business situation.
